title: blob: upload to blobUploadUrl with sha256 verification
description:
Implement blob upload in a new blob module (crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs):
- POST multipart/form-data to session.blobUploadUrl
- Parse upload response: blobId, size, type, sha256
- Verify sha256 of uploaded bytes against response per draft-atwood-jmap-cid-00
- Return BlobId on success; return ClientError::BlobVerificationFailed if sha256 mismatch
- Never log the blob content (may contain private media)
- Test: upload known bytes, assert blobId returned and sha256 matches expected value (fixture)
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
